_comment: PRODUCT profile (SGO-180) — 0-review-via-queue. For product repos (e.g. kairix) once their gate is hardened to gate-hardening.md and verified green, then flipped. Adopting this file does NOT turn on lights-out until a repo applies it AND enables the merge queue in the web UI.
_comment_review: required_approving_review_count = 0: WORK merges on a GREEN gate with no human. require_code_owner_review = true keeps the CONTROL PLANE (the gate's own definition) HITL — see governance/CODEOWNERS (two-tier). The gate is the only control, so 'green' must be trustworthy: invest in the required checks below and keep them deterministic.
_comment_required_checks: The required set that makes green trustworthy enough for 0-review (gate-hardening.md): 'CI gate' (the fan-in check-run), 'Independent verifier' and 'Mutation' PROMOTED to required contexts, and 'SonarCloud scan' (new-code honest-green). Ship 'Independent verifier' ADVISORY first (informational, NOT in this set) and add it here only once its measured false-fail rate is acceptable — a flaky required check causes agent loops.
_comment_merge_queue: The merge_queue rule is deliberately NOT in this file: the REST rulesets API returns 422 for it. Enable it via Settings -> Rules -> Rulesets in the web UI using governance/rulesets/merge-queue.json as the snapshot. Cross-ref: MERGE-QUEUE-D1.md (Issue 2).
_comment_bypass: bypass_actors is EMPTY by design — no actor (including agent App identities) may bypass the rules. ADRs: STD-MERGE, RULESET-D1, CODEOWNERS-D1, GATE-HARDEN.
name: main-product
